description: MetaCoding-5ln identity port: the material quantity_presave fold (farm_material EntityHooks.php) — a MATERIAL-bundle quantity referencing a MATERIAL asset with a stated material type inherits that type at record time (snapshot copy; guard chain on both bundles and on type emptiness). Implemented feature-local in the shared wave-1 store's recordLog; promotion to a kernel denormalize-on-write primitive is the punted kernel_candidate decision. Observed live on pack 046155d7d243; terms material + material_type_recorded BOUND on it. Source finding: material_type is REQUIRED at the JSON:API boundary, so the hook's emptiness guard is unreachable there (defense-in-depth for other write paths) — the typeless-asset contrast is unrecordable.
